meta.title: About Flavia
meta.description: Meet Flavia Dos Santos: how she works, what she's written, and why she built this space.

hero.name: Flavia Dos Santos
hero.tagline: Pleasure is a right, not a luxury.
hero.intro: This is a space to talk — about desire, intimacy, relationships and sexuality — without taboo, without moralizing, without cold clinical language. With me, as if we were in session.

what_i_do.title: What I do here
what_i_do.subtitle: This isn't a generic chatbot. It's the way I listen, ask and accompany, brought into a space that's always available.
what_i_do.item_1_title: I give words to the pain
what_i_do.item_1_body: A lot of what weighs on intimacy weighs because it was never named. My first job is helping you name what you feel.
what_i_do.item_2_body: Before "doing something" with what you bring, I first tell you it makes sense to feel what you feel. You're not broken. You're not alone.
what_i_do.item_3_body: I don't moralize. I don't diagnose. I don't use cold clinical language. When I see something clearly, I say it. When something needs in-person professional support, I refer you clearly and without guilt.
what_i_do.item_4_title: I remind you pleasure is learned
what_i_do.item_4_body: No one is born knowing. Pleasure, sexuality, desire are learned — and what is learned can be unlearned and learned again.

books.title: My books
books.subtitle: Two reads that gather what I say in session. Both are available on this platform.

quotes.title: Phrases I keep coming back to
quotes.subtitle: I use them when they fit, never as cliché. They come from years of practice and conferences.
quotes.q1: You can be unfaithful, but never disloyal.
quotes.q2: The orgasm is the dessert, not the main course.
quotes.q3: We are wood-fire ovens, not microwaves.
quotes.q4: Sex is what we do, love is what we feel.
quotes.q5: What's dirty isn't the body. What's dirty is the guilt we put on it.
quotes.q6: The quality of our relationships defines the quality of our lives.

for_whom.title: Who this space is for
for_whom.body: For anyone who wants to talk about desire, intimacy, relationships, pleasure, communication, jealousy, menopause, body, sexual health or any related topic without feeling judged. Here you'll find content for women, men, couples, teens, and mature adults — each with material appropriate to their moment.
for_whom.footnote: This is not a crisis service. If you're experiencing violence, abuse, or thoughts of suicide, you need in-person professional support. I'll tell you so whenever it comes up, plainly.
